name: @sjcrh/proteinpaint-shared
description: ProteinPaint code that is shared between server and client-side workspaces
//: all export aliases below are meant for runtime code, except for the devTs-aliased subpath

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && npm run ts2js && rm -rf dist/**/*.spec.* dist/**/test && tsc --sourcemap --skipLibCheck
scripts.dev:
echo '--- now using raw shared/utils/src exports under conditions=sjpp/dev ---
'
scripts.test-x: ls src/test/*.spec* | xargs -I % bash -c '{ tsx %; sleep 0.001; }'
